gold: Anna, son transferinde biraz gecikme olmuştu. Son transferimi bir gösterir misin? Bana email gönderir misin son transferin detaylarını?

sigWerErrors.reason: 'Transferinde' (in your transfer) vs 'transferimde' (in my transfer) changes the subject from second to first person, but the overall meaning is still clear in context.
'Transferimi' (my transfer - accusative) vs 'transferime' (to my transfer - dative) changes the grammatical case, but the intent is still understandable.

The word 'göz' (eye) is inserted as part of the phrase 'göz atar mısın' (can you take a look), which is a different way of asking the same thing as 'gösterir misin' (can you show). The meaning is preserved.
'Gösterir misin' (can you show) vs 'göz atar mısın' (can you take a look) are different expressions but convey the same request in this context.
